policy_statement: Iconic Corp mandates Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all privileged and administrative accounts with immediate effect. Standard user accounts shall achieve 100% MFA enrollment by Q2 2026 as part of the Zero Trust transformation programme.

in_scope: All Microsoft 365 accounts (admin and standard users)
External partner accounts with access to corporate systems
out_of_scope: Non-interactive service accounts (covered by separate Service Account Policy POL-IAM-0043)

mandatory_mfa_accounts.rollout_plan: Phased quarterly rollout — pilot Q1 2026, full enforcement Q2 2026

prohibited: SMS-only MFA for admin accounts from 2026-06-30
Voice call MFA for admin accounts
requirements.exceptions_process: All MFA exceptions require CISO approval, documented business justification, compensating controls, and mandatory review every 90 days

compliance_framework_mapping.NIS2_Article_21j: Authentication and access control — MFA requirement for privileged accounts

policy_gaps_noted_at_audit: Policy requires 100% admin MFA since 2024-01-01 but 3 admin accounts remain non-compliant (22 exceptions active)
Standard user deadline of Q2 2026 means current 62% coverage is within policy timeline but represents a risk
SMS MFA phaseout for admins scheduled for 2026-06-30 — 18 admins still using SMS-only
